subject: biology
title: 17M.1.SL.TZ1.23
question_html:
A plant has cambium in its vascular tissue and pollen is produced in male cones. The plant disperses seeds but does not produce fruit. In which phylum does this plant belong?

A. Coniferophyta

B. Angiospermophyta

C. Filicinophyta

D. Bryophyta
